tree.setup: A café with wood-paneled walls and the smell of fresh pastry. You were supposed to meet your friend Xiao Mei at 3 PM. It is now 3:25. The subway had other plans, involving an unexplained fifteen-minute stop between stations during which the only announcement was 'please wait patiently' — repeated with increasing irony. Xiao Mei has been texting you question marks of escalating size.
tree.setup_zh: 一家木质墙板的咖啡馆，空气里飘着新鲜糕点的香味。你本来应该下午三点跟小梅见面。现在已经三点二十五了。地铁有别的计划，包括在两站之间莫名其妙地停了十五分钟，唯一的广播是「请乘客耐心等候」——重复得越来越讽刺。小梅一直在给你发越来越大的问号。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你终于来了！我还以为你不来了呢。怎么回事？
turns.text_pinyin: nǐ zhōngyú lái le! wǒ hái yǐwéi nǐ bù lái le ne. zěnme huí shì?
turns.text_en: You're finally here! I thought you weren't coming. What happened?

options.text_zh: 对不起对不起！地铁在中间停了十五分钟，也没说原因。我一直在给你发消息，你没收到吗？
options.text_pinyin: duìbuqǐ duìbuqǐ! dìtiě zài zhōngjiān tíng le shíwǔ fēnzhōng, yě méi shuō yuányīn. wǒ yìzhí zài gěi nǐ fā xiāoxi, nǐ méi shōu dào ma?
options.text_en: I'm so sorry! The subway stopped for fifteen minutes between stations without explanation. I kept texting you — didn't you get them?
options.feedback: Double apology, explanation, and evidence of communication attempts — Xiao Mei's irritation begins to dissolve.

options.text_pinyin: bù hǎo yìsi, dìtiě wǎn le.
options.feedback: Brief but honest. She'll accept it, though the question marks were not sent lightly.
Wait — you said you took the subway. Xiao Mei's eyes narrow. Consistency matters.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 哦，地铁故障啊。那没办法。我已经帮你点了一杯拿铁，不知道你还喝不喝。
turns.text_pinyin: ó, dìtiě gùzhàng a. nà méi bànfǎ. wǒ yǐjīng bāng nǐ diǎn le yì bēi ná tiě, bù zhīdào nǐ hái hē bù hē.
turns.text_en: Oh, subway breakdown. Can't help that then. I already ordered you a latte — not sure if you still want it.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Accept graciously and make it up to her.

options.text_zh: 你还帮我点了？太好了！今天的咖啡我请。算是迟到的补偿。
options.text_pinyin: nǐ hái bāng wǒ diǎn le? tài hǎo le! jīntiān de kāfēi wǒ qǐng. suàn shì chídào de bǔcháng.
options.text_en: You ordered for me? That's so nice! Coffee's on me today — consider it late-arrival compensation.
options.feedback: Turning the apology into generosity — Xiao Mei's question marks are forgiven and forgotten.
Grateful. The latte is still warm, and so is the friendship.

options.text_en: You waited a long time, huh?
options.feedback: Stating the obvious — she was here for twenty-five minutes. But at least you acknowledge it.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好好好，那你请。以后记得早出门十分钟，北京的地铁你也知道的。对了，我要跟你说一件事——
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo hǎo hǎo, nà nǐ qǐng. yǐhòu jìde zǎo chūmén shí fēnzhōng, Běijīng de dìtiě nǐ yě zhīdào de. duìle, wǒ yào gēn nǐ shuō yí jiàn shì——
turns.text_en: OK OK, your treat then. Remember to leave ten minutes early next time — you know Beijing's subway. Oh, I wanted to tell you something—

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Show you're listening and move forward.

options.text_zh: 你说！我洗耳恭听。下次一定提前出门，保证不迟到。
options.text_pinyin: nǐ shuō! wǒ xǐ ěr gōng tīng. xià cì yídìng tíqián chūmén, bǎozhèng bù chídào.
options.text_en: Tell me! I'm all ears. And I'll definitely leave early next time — guaranteed no lateness.
options.feedback: 洗耳恭听 is a lovely idiom here — 'washing my ears to listen respectfully.' Xiao Mei laughs. The afternoon is saved.
Ready to listen. The coffee conversation begins properly.

options.text_pinyin: xià cì bú huì le. shuō ba.
options.feedback: The promise is noted. Xiao Mei will test it next time.

tree.cultural_note: Punctuality is valued in China, but transportation delays (especially subway and traffic) are universally understood excuses. The key to a good apology is: acknowledge, explain, and compensate. Offering to 请客 (qǐngkè, treat) is a classic make-up gesture.
